subcodes.first_line: O thou glorious martyr! That which concerneth the degrees of yearning and attraction of the friends, and the firmness and steadfastness of the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید المجید آنچه از مراتب شوق و انجذاب دوستان و رسوخ و ثبات یاران بر
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @Hands of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
